creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Thu Jun 20 04:21:07 2013
New Revision: 321350
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321350

Log:
  - Update to 1.0.0
  - Fix whitespace in pkg-descr
  
  PR:		ports/179534
  Submitted by:	Koichiro IWAO <meta+ports@vmeta.jp> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/net-im/rubygem-earthquake/Makefile
  head/net-im/rubygem-earthquake/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/net-im/rubygem-earthquake/files/patch-gemspec
  head/net-im/rubygem-earthquake/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/net-im/rubygem-earthquake/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-im/rubygem-earthquake/Makefile	Thu Jun 20 04:15:59 2013	(r321349)
+++ head/net-im/rubygem-earthquake/Makefile	Thu Jun 20 04:21:07 2013	(r321350)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	earthquake
-PORTVERSION=	0.9.4
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.0
 CATEGORIES=	net-im rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ BUILD_DEPENDS=	rubygem-twitter-stream>=0
 		rubygem-awesome_print>=1.0.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-awesome_print \
 		rubygem-launchy>=2.0.5:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-launchy \
 		rubygem-oauth>=0.4.5:${PORTSDIR}/net/rubygem-oauth \
-		rubygem-twitter_oauth>=0.4.3:${PORTSDIR}/security/rubygem-twitter_oauth \
+		rubygem-jugyo-twitter_oauth>=0.5.0.pre5:${PORTSDIR}/security/rubygem-jugyo-twitter_oauth \
 		rubygem-slop>=2.4.4:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-slop
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
